notes: Post-repair recheck pins 52 unique current formulations and excludes stale seasonal, alcohol-only, navigation, and press rows.

All 55 frozen rows remain reconciled exactly once: 44 exact, one normalized, three stale, and seven artifacts; 45 matched frozen presentations collapse to 43 current formulations and nine current formulations were restored.
Twenty-seven rows retain narrow restaurant-issued ingredient positives, twelve retain restaurant-linked partial affirmative labels, and thirteen remain unavailable.
All may-contain arrays are empty because no global cross-contact disclosure was published; missing linked-menu labels are never treated as negative evidence.
The dedicated reconstruction preserves service presentations and separates materially different Rigatoni, Prosciutto, Burger, and Pesce formulations.
The duplicate OSM record is absent from the generated repository while its frozen rows remain fully reconciled in its own audit dossier.

findings.summary: The frozen catalog contains three stale seasonal products and seven alcohol-only Italian Vermouth rows.
findings.resolution: Removed all three stale products and seven alcohol-only rows from the canonical food catalog.

findings.summary: Nine current formulations were absent, two frozen presentations were duplicates, and materially different Rigatoni, Prosciutto, Burger, and Pesce preparations were collapsed or smeared.
findings.resolution: Restored all nine current formulations, collapsed two duplicate frozen presentations, and pinned service-aware formulation identities.

findings.summary: Seventeen frozen rows have direct allergen arrays or provenance inconsistent with the current owner ingredients and partial linked-menu affirmative labels.
findings.resolution: Corrected all seventeen outcomes and preserved the exact restaurant-issued, restaurant-linked, and unavailable provenance split.

findings.summary: The OSM Aventino Cucina Romana record represents the same restaurant and address as aventino-bethesda.
findings.resolution: Removed the duplicate from the generated repository and retained aventino-bethesda as the canonical restaurant.

repairs.summary: Verified the current 52-formulation boundary, source authority split, empty cross-contact semantics, stale/artifact removal, restored formulations, and duplicate disposition.

notes: Generated snapshot counts: 52 total; 27 restaurant-issued ingredient-positive; 12 linked product-label; 13 unavailable; zero may-contain.
